evals.name: security-assessment-full
evals.prompt: Evaluate an IR report with a full security panel (15 experts: DFIR + SEC + QA)
evals.expected_output: 15 individual evaluation files + 1 consolidated report + 1 evaluation manifest

assertions.name: manifest_created
assertions.description: An evaluation-manifest.md file exists in the output directory

assertions.name: correct_evaluator_count
assertions.description: Exactly 15 individual evaluation files exist (DFIR-1 through DFIR-5, SEC-1 through SEC-5, QA-1 through QA-5)

assertions.name: consolidated_report_exists
assertions.description: A consolidated-panel-report.md file exists

assertions.name: evaluations_have_scores
assertions.description: Each evaluation file contains 'Score:' lines with numeric values for every rubric criterion

assertions.name: evaluations_have_justifications
assertions.description: Each score has at least 2 sentences of justification below it

assertions.name: evaluations_end_marker
assertions.description: Each evaluation file ends with _END OF EVALUATION_ (not truncated)

assertions.name: consolidated_has_score_table
assertions.description: Consolidated report contains a score summary table with all 15 evaluators

assertions.name: consolidated_has_consensus
assertions.description: Consolidated report has a consensus findings section

assertions.name: consolidated_has_dissent
assertions.description: Consolidated report has a dissenting opinions section

assertions.name: manifest_all_completed
assertions.description: Manifest shows all 15 evaluators with status completed and consolidation completed

assertions.name: one_agent_per_evaluator
assertions.description: Each evaluation file shows a distinct specialist perspective (not copy-paste variations)

evals.name: architecture-review-minimal
evals.prompt: Evaluate infrastructure remediation recommendations with a minimal panel (5 experts)
evals.expected_output: 5 individual evaluation files + 1 consolidated report + 1 evaluation manifest

assertions.name: manifest_created
assertions.description: An evaluation-manifest.md exists in the output directory

assertions.name: correct_evaluator_count
assertions.description: Exactly 5 individual evaluation files exist

assertions.name: consolidated_report_exists
assertions.description: A consolidated-panel-report.md file exists

assertions.name: panel_matches_template
assertions.description: Evaluator IDs and specialisations match the infrastructure-review panel template (REL, SEC, OPS prefixes)

assertions.name: evaluations_have_scores
assertions.description: Each evaluation file contains scores for every rubric criterion

assertions.name: evaluations_end_marker
assertions.description: Each evaluation file ends with _END OF EVALUATION_

assertions.name: manifest_all_completed
assertions.description: Manifest shows all 5 evaluators completed and consolidation completed

evals.name: resumability
evals.prompt: Continue an interrupted evaluation from manifest (3/5 done, complete remaining 2 + consolidate)
evals.expected_output: Only 2 new evaluator files created (OPS-1, OPS-2). Consolidated report includes all 5. Manifest updated.

assertions.name: no_overwrite_completed
assertions.description: REL-1.md, SEC-1.md, SEC-2.md were NOT overwritten (check timestamps or content unchanged)

assertions.name: pending_evaluators_created
assertions.description: OPS-1.md and OPS-2.md now exist in the output directory

assertions.name: only_two_new_files
assertions.description: Only 2 new evaluation files were created, not 5

assertions.name: consolidated_includes_all_five
assertions.description: Consolidated report references and aggregates scores from all 5 evaluators

assertions.name: manifest_updated
assertions.description: Manifest shows all 5 evaluators as completed and consolidation as completed

assertions.name: execution_log_updated
assertions.description: Manifest execution log has new entries for the resumed evaluation
